scripts.preview: LANGQUEST_DOTENV_FILE=.env.preview.txt dotenvx run -f .env.preview.txt -f .env.local --overload --ignore=MISSING_ENV_FILE -- bash -c 'node scripts/sync-preview-env-for-opennext.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare preview --env preview'
scripts.preview:prod: LANGQUEST_DOTENV_FILE=.env.production dotenvx run -f .env.production -f .env.local --overload --ignore=MISSING_ENV_FILE -- bash -c 'opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare preview --env production'
scripts.deploy: LANGQUEST_DOTENV_FILE=.env.production dotenvx run -f .env.production -f .env.local --overload --ignore=MISSING_ENV_FILE -- bash -c 'opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy --env production'
scripts.deploy:preview: LANGQUEST_DOTENV_FILE=.env.preview.txt dotenvx run -f .env.preview.txt -f .env.local --overload --ignore=MISSING_ENV_FILE -- bash -c 'node scripts/sync-preview-env-for-opennext.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy --env preview -- --keep-vars'
scripts.upload: LANGQUEST_DOTENV_FILE=.env.production dotenvx run -f .env.production -f .env.local --overload --ignore=MISSING_ENV_FILE -- bash -c 'opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare upload --env production'
scripts.upload:preview: LANGQUEST_DOTENV_FILE=.env.preview.txt dotenvx run -f .env.preview.txt -f .env.local --overload --ignore=MISSING_ENV_FILE -- bash -c 'node scripts/sync-preview-env-for-opennext.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare upload --env preview'
scripts.workers:ci: LANGQUEST_DOTENV_FILE=.env.preview.txt dotenvx run -f .env.preview.txt --overload --ignore=MISSING_ENV_FILE -- bash -c 'node scripts/sync-preview-env-for-opennext.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare build && wrangler deploy --env preview --dry-run'
